na serverju zadnji podatki
[gnv30928@h230 frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64]$ cat frps.toml 
[common]
bindPort = 7000
token = "FIpnSKNjoNbWZTsPpi3Nb4etUD9ClD6myChIxbpxYPriTHkU3O"

# To je OBVEZNO za HTTP proxy z customDomains!
vhostHTTPPort = 8080

# Dashboard (opcijsko)
webServer.port = 7500
webServer.user = "admin"
webServer.password = "98UjhW17w6C4qIr8gvkj"
[gnv30928@h230 frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64]$ nohup ./frps -c frps.toml > frps.log 2>&1 &
[1] 3686436
[gnv30928@h230 frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64]$ sleep 3
[gnv30928@h230 frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64]$ cat frps.log
nohup: ignoring input
WARNING: ini format is deprecated and the support will be removed in the future, please use yaml/json/toml format instead!
2026-05-29 09:17:41.027 [I] [frps/root.go:115] frps uses config file: frps.toml
2026-05-29 09:17:41.133 [I] [server/service.go:249] frps tcp listen on 0.0.0.0:7000
2026-05-29 09:17:41.134 [I] [frps/root.go:124] frps started successfully
na k3s masterju
admin_os@k3s-master:~/frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64$ ps aux | grep frps
admin_os 2867642  0.0  0.0   6552  2356 pts/1    S+   07:21   0:00 grep --color=auto frps
admin_os@k3s-master:~/frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64$ pkill -9 frpc
pkill: killing pid 2868101 failed: Operation not permitted
admin_os@k3s-master:~/frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64$ sudo !!
sudo pkill -9 frpc
[sudo] password for admin_os: 
admin_os@k3s-master:~/frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64$ ps aux | grep frps
admin_os 2868454  0.0  0.0   6552  2352 pts/1    S+   07:22   0:00 grep --color=auto frps
admin_os@k3s-master:~/frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64$ nohup ./frpc -c frpc.toml > frpc.log 2>&1 &
sleep 3
cat frpc.log
[1] 2868871
nohup: ignoring input
2026-05-29 07:22:48.554 [I] [sub/root.go:201] start frpc service for config file [frpc.toml] with aggregated configuration
2026-05-29 07:22:48.554 [I] [client/service.go:308] try to connect to server...
na k3s masterju je v tej mapi ~/frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64
na 185.69.149.101 pa je lociran /home/gnv30928/domains/ostc.si/frp_0.69.0_linux_amd64

daj prosim postavi vse skupaj oziroma daj res dobre napotke za popravit

to sobila prejšna navodila/prompt, si rekel naj v control pannelu odprem port, tu je koda strani control pannnela, rabim usmeritev
